scripts.dev:sim: concurrently "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npx @evenrealities/evenhub-simulator http://localhost:5173"
scripts.dev:qr: concurrently "npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && node scripts/show-qr.js"
scripts.even:pack: npm run build && evenhub pack app.json dist --output g2-timer.ehpk
scripts.even:pack:check: npm run build && evenhub pack app.json dist --output g2-timer.ehpk --check
